description: A square 'THE WORST FIRST' card. The background is a desaturated black-and-white photograph of an adult man: bald, with a goatee, wearing a dark jacket, shown from the chest up against a tiled or brick interior wall. A dark gradient is on the left behind the text. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/12/2025 | St. Paul, MN'. A red diagonal banner at top-right reads 'ST. PAUL'. Large bold white name at left: 'Sergio Angel Montes-Sanchez'. Bold white 'CRIME:' label with bullet 'Criminal sexual conduct'. A round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark are at bottom-left; a red box at bottom-right reads '-THE- WORST FIRST'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/12/2025 | St. Paul, MN; Sergio Angel Montes-Sanchez; CRIME: Criminal sexual conduct; ST. PAUL; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
